message:
test(conformance): add memory_ops and string_ops conformance test harnesses

Add dedicated conformance test suites for two core fixture families:

- memory_ops_conformance_test.rs (13 tests): validates memory_ops.json
  covering memcpy, memmove, memset, memcmp, memchr with C11 spec
  references and both strict/hardened modes

- string_ops_conformance_test.rs (12 tests): validates string_ops.json
  covering strcpy, strncpy, strcat, strcmp, strchr, strrchr, strstr,
  memchr with overflow protection validation in hardened mode

Each harness validates fixture schema, coverage patterns, error codes,
function distribution, mode validity, and case count stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
